mapper.sql: AA.RAW_SEQ , AA.PTN_SEQ , AA.RAW_NAME , AA.PROD_COMPANY , AA.PROD_COUNTRY , AA.SUPPLIER , AA.WEIGHT , AA.THUMBNAIL_ID , AA.USE_YN , AA.DEL_YN , AA.RGTR , TO_CHAR(AA.RGT_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RGT_DTTM , AA.CHNR , TO_CHAR(AA.CHNG_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CHNG_DTTM
BB.RAW_ELM_SEQ , BB.RAW_SEQ , BB.RAW_ELM_ID , BB.SORT_ORD , BB.RGTR , BB.RGT_DTTM

FF.RAW_DETAIL_SEQ , FF.RAW_SEQ , FF.MEMB_SEQ , FF.TITLE , FF.HASHTAG , FF.FILE_ID , FF.RAW_DESC , FF.RAW_DETAIL , FF.VIEW_CNT , FF.REQUEST_CNT , FF.PERMIT_YN , FF.USE_YN , FF.DEL_YN , FF.RGTR , FF.RGT_DTTM , FF.CHNR , FF.CHNG_DTTM , FF.DLTR , FF.DLT_DTTM

if.if: AND ( REPLACE(UPPER(AA.RAW_NAME), ' ', '') LIKE '%' || REPLACE(UPPER(TRIM(#{searchText, jdbcType=VARCHAR})), ' ', '') || '%' OR REPLACE(UPPER(MI.MEMB_NAME), ' ', '') LIKE '%' || REPLACE(UPPER(TRIM(#{searchText, jdbcType=VARCHAR})), ' ', '') || '%' )

mapper.select:
/* com.erns.coching.raw.mapper.RawDAO.getListCount */
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM T_RAW_MST AA INNER JOIN T_RAW_MANAGER EE ON AA.RAW_SEQ = EE.RAW_SEQ LEFT OUTER JOIN T_RAW_DETAIL FF ON AA.RAW_SEQ = FF.RAW_SEQ AND EE.MEMB_SEQ = FF.MEMB_SEQ AND FF.DEL_YN = 'N' INNER JOIN T_MEMB_INF MI ON EE.MEMB_SEQ = MI.MEMB_SEQ

/* com.erns.coching.raw.mapper.RawDAO.getListCount */
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM T_RAW_MST AA INNER JOIN T_MEMB_INF MI ON AA.RGTR = MI.MEMB_SEQ
